'''鈭歳-p-z''' ('''karapaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nerve|nerve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nerve|nerve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-p-z
|-
! Lemma
| karapaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirapaz|thirapaz]] || [[word:jirapaz|jirapaz]] || [[word:shirapaz|shirapaz]] || [[word:kirapaz|kirapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurapaz|thuthurapaz]] || [[word:jujurapaz|jujurapaz]] || [[word:shushurapaz|shushurapaz]] || [[word:kukurapaz|kukurapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurapaz|thurapaz]] || [[word:jurapaz|jurapaz]] || [[word:shurapaz|shurapaz]] || [[word:kurapaz|kurapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurapaz|thurapaz]] || [[word:jurapaz|jurapaz]] || [[word:shurapaz|shurapaz]] || [[word:kurapaz|kurapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therapaz|therapaz]] || [[word:jerapaz|jerapaz]] || [[word:sherapaz|sherapaz]] || [[word:kerapaz|kerapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorapaz|thothorapaz]] || [[word:jojorapaz|jojorapaz]] || [[word:shoshorapaz|shoshorapaz]] || [[word:kokorapaz|kokorapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorapaz|thorapaz]] || [[word:jorapaz|jorapaz]] || [[word:shorapaz|shorapaz]] || [[word:korapaz|korapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorapaz|thorapaz]] || [[word:jorapaz|jorapaz]] || [[word:shorapaz|shorapaz]] || [[word:korapaz|korapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rapaz|th忙rapaz]] || [[word:j忙rapaz|j忙rapaz]] || [[word:sh忙rapaz|sh忙rapaz]] || [[word:k忙rapaz|k忙rapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharapaz|thatharapaz]] || [[word:jajarapaz|jajarapaz]] || [[word:shasharapaz|shasharapaz]] || [[word:kakarapaz|kakarapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharapaz|tharapaz]] || [[word:jarapaz|jarapaz]] || [[word:sharapaz|sharapaz]] || [[word:karapaz|karapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapaz|tharapaz]] || [[word:jarapaz|jarapaz]] || [[word:sharapaz|sharapaz]] || [[word:karapaz|karapaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharapaz|sharapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharapaz|gosharapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharapaz|gokisharapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharapazn眉|sharapazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharapaznkn眉|gosharapaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharapazn眉|gokisharapazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharapazsh毛|sharapazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharapaznksh毛|gosharapaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharapazsh毛|gokisharapazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharapazro|sharapazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharapaznkro|gosharapaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharapazro|gokisharapazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharapazmu|sharapazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharapaznkmu|gosharapaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharapazmu|gokisharapazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharapazsher|sharapazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharapaznksher|gosharapaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharapazsher|gokisharapazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharapazng|sharapazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharapaznkng|gosharapaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharapazng|gokisharapazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharapazya|sharapazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharapaznkya|gosharapaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharapazya|gokisharapazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharapazyam|sharapazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharapaznkyam|gosharapaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharapazyam|gokisharapazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharapazn眉sh毛|sharapazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharapaznkn眉sh毛|gosharapaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharapazn眉sh毛|gokisharapazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharapazn眉ro|sharapazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharapaznkn眉ro|gosharapaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharapazn眉ro|gokisharapazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharapazn眉mu|sharapazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharapaznkn眉mu|gosharapaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharapazn眉mu|gokisharapazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharapazsh毛n眉|sharapazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharapaznksh毛n眉|gosharapaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharapazsh毛n眉|gokisharapazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharapazsh毛ro|sharapazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharapaznksh毛ro|gosharapaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharapazsh毛ro|gokisharapazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharapazsh毛mu|sharapazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharapaznksh毛mu|gosharapaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharapazsh毛mu|gokisharapazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharapazron眉|sharapazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharapaznkron眉|gosharapaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharapazron眉|gokisharapazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharapazrosh毛|sharapazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharapaznkrosh毛|gosharapaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharapazrosh毛|gokisharapazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharapazromu|sharapazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharapaznkromu|gosharapaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharapazromu|gokisharapazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharapazmun眉|sharapazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharapaznkmun眉|gosharapaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharapazmun眉|gokisharapazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharapazmush毛|sharapazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharapaznkmush毛|gosharapaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharapazmush毛|gokisharapazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharapazmuro|sharapazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharapaznkmuro|gosharapaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharapazmuro|gokisharapazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
